2606.29858.title: Smooth Scaling Laws Hide Stepwise Token Learning
2606.29858.paper_summary: Language model loss follows remarkably regular scaling laws over model and data size, yet it remains unclear why the aggregate loss should exhibit a power-law form. Existing explanations often attribute this regularity to a heavy-tailed spectrum of pattern difficulty in natural language, but this view has not been directly validated at token-level granularity in large-scale real-data training. We present a token-level framework that decomposes scaling laws into localized learning events of individual contextualized tokens. By fitting token loss trajectories with sigmoids, we show that token learning is concentrated in localized transitions, giving rise to a learning-time spectrum that dominates the scaling-law shape. Across more than one hundred pre-training runs on large and diverse real-language corpora with modern LLM architectures, scaling up to 6B parameters and 300B training tokens, the measured learning-time spectrum quantitatively reconstructs the validation loss derivative along the training-step $T$, data-scale $D$, and model-scale $M$ axes. We further show that the same signal is actionable: by reshaping the training distribution according to when tokens become learnable, we alter the optimization trajectory and achieve 11\% faster validation-loss reduction. These results provide direct empirical evidence that scaling laws are governed primarily by the distribution of token-level learning times, and that this distribution can be used not only to explain scaling behavior but also to improve training performance.
2606.29858.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型的損失在模型和數據大小上遵循著相當規則的縮放法則，但為什麼總體損失會呈現冪律形式仍然不清楚。現有的解釋通常將這種規律歸因於自然語言中模式難度的重尾光譜，但這一觀點尚未在大規模真實數據訓練中以標記級別的粒度直接驗證。我們提出了一個標記級別的框架，將縮放法則分解為單個上下文化標記的局部學習事件。通過用S型曲線擬合標記損失軌跡，我們顯示標記學習集中在局部轉變中，產生主導縮放法則形狀的學習時間光譜。在超過一百次的大規模多樣化真實語言語料庫的預訓練運行中，使用現代LLM架構，擴展至60億參數和3000億訓練標記，測量的學習時間光譜定量重建了沿著訓練步驟$T$、數據規模$D$和模型規模$M$軸的驗證損失導數。我們進一步顯示，相同的信號是可操作的：通過根據標記變得可學習的時間重塑訓練分佈，我們改變了優化軌跡，實現了11\%更快的驗證損失減少。這些結果提供了直接的實證證據，表明縮放法則主要由標記級別學習時間的分佈所主導，並且這一分佈不僅可以用來解釋縮放行為，還可以用來改善訓練性能。
2606.29858.author: Pingjie Wang et.al.
2606.29858.authors: Pingjie Wang, Zechen Hu, Peiru Yang, Fu Guo, Debing Zhang
